meaning: <德>n.[常用作对女性的称呼]宝贝,心肝,亲爱的
examples: "How do you feel, Schatz?" I asked him.
Schatz, can you please complete this sentence for me: 'Life is like…'
In overnight news, a German two-year note auction saw the notes (also called Schatz) fetch strong demand with a yield of only 0.06%.
Having someone like an Aaron Schatz from Football Outsiders on is really terrific, because he obviously does high quality work that is acknowledged to be high quality.
